title: Old Fireflies
description: Brings back the old fireflies from Minecraft Live 2021 to replace the new fireflies and firefly bushes
body:
This resource pack changes the firefly bush particles to the 2 pixel fireflies from Minecraft Live 2021 and also replaces the fireflies on the firefly bush itself

![FIreflies in Swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dZlL3uf8/images/7d52ba220dffc7f0543fba52c1b53421b86682dc.png)
